event: Fishing Nets Drying on a Coastline
description: A coastal landscape showing large fishing nets suspended from tall wooden poles on a rocky shoreline. The nets billow and drape in the wind, creating translucent curtain-like forms against a pale sky and dark hills in the background. The terrain is barren and rocky with earth tones. The palette is muted—browns, grays, and faded whites—creating an austere, weathered atmosphere.
